julesThoughtProcess: I chose Cyber Gold (#FFD700) to represent the high-contrast 1-bit aesthetics. It provides a striking contrast against the dark background, signifying a high-tier runner. Placed at (100, 0) adjacent to the Pink Glitch.
storyPanel: A master of hardware manipulation, 'The Sovereign' bypasses biometric locks with custom 1-bit synthetic neural interfaces. Their presence is heralded by bursts of high-voltage gold, completely frying corporate security systems.
